title: pilea muscosa var. microphylla
intro: Pilea muscosa var. microphylla is a plant species belonging to the family Urticaceae, commonly known as the 'small-leaved Pilea' due to its compact and diminutive foliage. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pilea muscosa var. microphylla include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antifungal properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Pilea muscosa var. microphylla can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections.
